Title: Formula Coverage Limitation (189/197 Fractals)
Description: Only 8/197 formulas in CPU renderer; 189 use Mandelbrot fallback
Impact: Thumbnails approximate, autopilot suboptimal for 189 fractals
Mitigation: UI badges set expectations, GPU renders correctly

Title: Emulator GPU Thumbnail Generation Blocked
Description: SwiftShader produces 99.8% black pixels; no viable GPU output on emulator
Impact: Cannot use GPU workaround; requires real device
Mitigation: Document limitation, plan Phase 2 for device

Title: ProviderNotFoundException Risk - FractalController Navigation
Description: FractalController provider may not be wrapped around viewer route
Mitigation: Tests passing, but not all paths covered

Title: Dart Type Promotion Failure on Object Fields
Description: Object fields don't type-promote in if/ternary; requires local variable workaround
Impact: Type errors at compile time without workaround

Title: Deprecated API: decodeImageFromPixels
Description: Using deprecated ui.decodeImageFromPixels() with no replacement available
Impact: App will break when API is removed (Flutter 4.x?)
Mitigation: Suppress warning, monitor for replacement API

Title: Unused Private Methods (Dead Code)
Description: _openHistory and 3 other methods implemented but never called
Impact: Code clutter, maintenance burden, unclear feature status

Title: AR Tab Feature Incomplete
Description: AR functionality exists but not wired into home navigation
Impact: AR discovery poor, longer user path to reach feature
Mitigation: Plan to add AR tab to home screen

Title: GPU Integration Test Unused Variables
Description: Services created but not used: presetStore, arQualityStore, accessibilityService
Impact: Test setup unclear, possible incomplete test coverage
Mitigation: Review test purpose and either use or remove

Title: Linting: 429 prefer_const_constructors Issues
Impact: Memory waste with repeated allocations, slower performance
Mitigation: Add const to constructors across codebase

Title: L10n Auto-Generated Suppressions
Description: Generated localization files have expected analyzer suppressions

Title: Build Artifact Cleanup
Description: Release APK (28.2 MB) in build directory should be archived/uploaded
Mitigation: Upload to Play Store or remove from repo
